transactions.desc: De Los Santos was optioned to Triple-A Scranton/Wilkes-Barre after Monday's game against the Tigers. He allowed two unearned runs on two hits across two innings.
The Dodgers optioned Ward to Triple-A Oklahoma City on Monday.
The Padres optioned Wagner to Triple-A El Paso on Monday.
The Padres recalled Rodriguez from Double-A San Antonio on Monday.
The Orioles recalled Walker from Triple-A Norfolk on Monday.
The Athletics designated Kelly for assignment Monday.
The Athletics recalled Hernaiz from Triple-A Las Vegas on Monday.
The Athletics recalled Morris from Triple-A Las Vegas on Monday.
The Athletics selected Kuroda-Grauer's contract from Triple-A Las Vegas on Monday.
The Cubs recalled Alcantara from Triple-A Iowa on Monday.
The Cubs recalled Hollowell from Triple-A Iowa on Monday.
The Twins recalled Laweryson from Triple-A St. Paul on Monday.
The Rangers designated Ross for assignment Monday.
The Rangers designated Kelenic for assignment Monday.
The Rangers selected Cauley's contract from Triple-A Round Rock on Monday.
The Astros optioned Delgado to Triple-A Sugar Land on Monday, Chandler Rome of The Athletic reports.
The Padres reinstated Cronenworth (concussion) from the 7-day injured list Monday. He'll start at second base and bat ninth in the Padres' series opener versus the Cubs.
The Astros activated Allen (hamstring) from the 10-day injured list Monday, Chandler Rome of The Athletic reports.
The Dodgers reinstated Hernandez (hamstring) from the 10-day injured list Monday. He'll start in left field and bat fifth in the Dodgers' series opener versus the Athletics.
The Mets recalled Gerber from Triple-A Syracuse on Monday.
The Mets optioned Myers to Triple-A Syracuse on Monday.
The Nationals recalled Cornelio from Triple-A Rochester on Monday.
The Nationals recalled Palmquist from Triple-A Rochester on Monday.
The Yankees recalled Bird from Triple-A Scranton/Wilkes-Barre on Monday.
Duno was promoted to Double-A Chattanooga on Sunday.
The Mariners acquired Kennedy from the Giants on Sunday in exchange for cash considerations.
The San Francisco Giants traded INF Buddy Kennedy to the Seattle Mariners.
Voth elected free agency Friday after clearing waivers, Bobby Nightengale of The Minnesota Star Tribune reports.
Culpepper (hip) went 0-for-4 with a strikeout in his return to the Triple-A St. Paul lineup in Sunday's 3-0 loss to Louisville after being reinstated from the 7-day injured list.
The Orioles claimed Zulueta off waivers from the Cubs on Sunday and optioned him to Triple-A Norfolk, Matt Weyrich of The Baltimore Sun reports.
